message:
fix(mux): remove document.title updates during downloads

Removed all document.title updates that were overriding other page titles.
The title updates for download progress were:
- Showing file progress during active transfers
- Resetting to 'termweb' on completion/cancel/error

Users found this intrusive when multiple tabs/features set custom titles.

Changes:
- App.svelte:508-517: Removed progress title update
- App.svelte:539-543: Removed completion title reset
- App.svelte:551-555: Removed cancel title reset
- App.svelte:555-559: Removed error title reset

Result: Page title is no longer modified by download progress.
